title: basananthe littoralis
intro: Basananthe littoralis, also known as the African mistletoe or mistletoe plant, is a parasitic shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Basananthe littoralis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the leaves and stems in water, which can be used as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
